headline: Is Allstate (ALL) Pricing Reflect Its Recent Returns And Insurance Sector Headlines
summary: If you are wondering whether Allstate's current share price reflects its real worth, this article walks through the key numbers that matter for you as a shareholder or potential buyer. The stock recently closed at US$213.15, with returns of 4.6% year to date and 7.3% over the past year, while the share price has fallen 3.1% in the last week and is up 1.0% over the past month. Recent headlines around Allstate have centered on its position among major U.S. insurers, ongoing discussions about...
